---
title: "Publications"
toc: false
---



```{=html}
<div class="pub-list">

<div class="pub-year-group">
  <div class="pub-year">2026</div>
  <div class="pub-entries">
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Ecosystem of Large Language Models for Code.</b><br>
      Zhou Yang, Jieke Shi, Premkumar T. Devanbu, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (TOSEM)</i>, 35(1), 2026.
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-year-group">
  <div class="pub-year">2025</div>
  <div class="pub-entries">
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>AutoTEE: Automated Migration and Protection of Programs in Trusted Execution Environments.</b><br>
      Zhou Yang, Jieke Shi, Muhammad Hilmi Asyrofi, Bowen Xu, Xin Zhou, DongGyun Han, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (TOSEM)</i>, 34(4), 2025.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Prioritizing Speech Test Cases.</b><br>
      Jieke Shi, Zhou Yang, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (TOSEM)</i>, 34(5), 2025.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Efficient and Green Large Language Models for Software Engineering: Literature Review, Vision, and the Road Ahead.</b><br>
      Jieke Shi, Zhou Yang, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (TOSEM)</i>, 34(5), 2025.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Finding Safety Violations of AI-Enabled Control Systems through the Lens of Synthesized Proxy Programs.</b><br>
      Jieke Shi, Zhou Yang, Junda He, Bowen Xu, Dongsun Kim, DongGyun Han, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (TOSEM)</i>, 34(7), 2025.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>How Does Quantization Impact Privacy Risk on LLMs for Code?</b><br>
      Zhou Yang, Jieke Shi, Premkumar T. Devanbu, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (TOSEM)</i>, 35(1), 2025.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Mut4All: Fuzzing Compilers via LLM-Synthesized Mutators Learned from Bug Reports.</b><br>
      Jieke Shi, Zhou Yang, Junda He, Bowen Xu, Dongsun Kim, DongGyun Han, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (TOSEM)</i>, 34(7), 2025.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Token Sugar: Making Source Code Sweeter for LLMs through Token-Efficient Shorthand.</b><br>
      Zhensu Sun, Chengran Yang, Xiaoning Du, Zhou Yang, Li Li, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (TOSEM)</i>, 2025.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>PTM4Tag+: Tag Recommendation of Stack Overflow Posts with Pre-trained Models.</b><br>
      Junda He, Bowen Xu, Zhou Yang, DongGyun Han, Chengran Yang, Jiakun Liu, Zhipeng Zhao, David Lo.<br>
      <i>Empirical Software Engineering (EMSE)</i>, 30(1), 2025.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>"My productivity is boosted, but ..." Demystifying Users' Perception on AI Coding Assistants.</b><br>
      Yunbo Lyu, Zhou Yang, Jieke Shi, Jianming Chang, Yue Liu, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ASE 2025</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Backdoors in Code Summarizers: How Bad Is It?</b><br>
      Chenyu Wang, Zhou Yang, Yaniv Harel, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ASE 2025</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>PTM4Tag+: Tag Recommendation of Stack Overflow Posts with Pre-trained Models.</b><br>
      Zhensu Sun, Chengran Yang, Xiaoning Du, Zhou Yang, Li Li, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ASE 2025</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Do Existing Testing Tools Really Uncover Gender Bias in Text-to-Image Models?</b><br>
      Yunbo Lyu, Zhou Yang, Yuqing Niu, Jing Jiang, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ACM Multimedia 2025</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>YourCoLo: Leveraging One-to-Many Relationships and Inter-Code Connections for User Review-Based Code Localization.</b><br>
      Yunbo Lyu, Zhou Yang, Yuqing Niu, Jing Jiang, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ACM Multimedia 2025</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Scrub It Out! Erasing Sensitive Memorization in Code Language Models via Machine Unlearning.</b><br>
      Zhaoyang Chu, Yao Wan, Zhikun Zhang, Di Wang, Zhou Yang, Hongyu Zhang, Pan Zhou, Xuanhua Shi, Hai Jin, David Lo.<br>
      <i>AIware 2025</i>.
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-year-group">
  <div class="pub-year">2024</div>
  <div class="pub-entries">
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Large Language Models for Software Engineering: A Systematic Literature Review.</b><br>
      Xinyi Hou, Yanjie Zhao, Yue Liu, Zhou Yang, Kailong Wang, Li Li, Xiapu Luo, David Lo, John Grundy, Haoyu Wang.<br>
      <i>ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (TOSEM)</i>, 2024.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Robustness, Security, Privacy, Explainability, Efficiency, and Usability of Large Language Models for Code.</b><br>
      Junda He, Xin Zhou, Bowen Xu, Ting Zhang, Kisub Kim, Zhou Yang, Ferdian Thung, Ivana Clairine Irsan, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (TOSEM)</i>, 33(3), 2024.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Stealthy Backdoor Attack for Code Models.</b><br>
      Zhou Yang, Bowen Xu, Jie M. Zhang, Hong Jin Kang, Jieke Shi, Junda He, David Lo.<br>
      <i>IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering (TSE)</i>, 2024.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Gotcha! This Model Uses My Code! Evaluating Membership Leakage Risks in Code Models.</b><br>
      Zhou Yang, Zhipeng Zhao, Chenyu Wang, Jieke Shi, Dongsun Kim, DongGyun Han, David Lo.<br>
      <i>IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering (TSE)</i>, 2024.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Unveiling Memorization in Code Models.</b><br>
      Zhou Yang, Zhipeng Zhao, Chenyu Wang, Jieke Shi, Dongsun Kim, DongGyun Han, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ICSE 2024</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Curiosity-Driven Testing for Sequential Decision-Making Process.</b><br>
      Junda He, Zhou Yang, Jieke Shi, Chengran Yang, Kisub Kim, Bowen Xu, Xin Zhou, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ICSE 2024</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Greening Large Language Models of Code.</b><br>
      Zhou Yang.<br>
      <i>ICSE (SEIS) 2024</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>AI Coders Are among Us: Rethinking Programming Language Grammar towards Efficient Code Generation.</b><br>
      Zhensu Sun, Xiaoning Du, Zhou Yang, Li Li, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ISSTA 2024</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Hotfixing Large Language Models for Code.</b><br>
      Zhensu Sun, Xiaoning Du, Zhou Yang, Li Li, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ISSTA 2024</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Baffle: Hiding Backdoors in Offline Reinforcement Learning Datasets.</b><br>
      Chen Gong, Zhou Yang, Yunpeng Bai, Junda He, Jieke Shi, Kecen Li, Arunesh Sinha, Bowen Xu, Xinwen Hou, David Lo, Tianhao Wang.<br>
      <i>IEEE S&amp;P 2024</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Assessing AI Detectors in Identifying AI-Generated Code: Implications for Education.</b><br>
      Wei Hung Pan, Ming Jie Chok, Jonathan Leong Shan Wong, Yung Xin Shin, Yeong Shian Poon, Zhou Yang, Chun Yong Chong, David Lo, Mei Kuan Lim.<br>
      <i>SEET@ICSE 2024</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Representation Learning for Stack Overflow Posts: How Far Are We?</b><br>
      Zhou Yang, Zhipeng Zhao, Chenyu Wang, Jieke Shi, Dongsun Kim, DongGyun Han, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ICSE 2024</i>.
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-year-group">
  <div class="pub-year">2023</div>
  <div class="pub-entries">
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Large Language Models for Software Engineering: A Systematic Literature Review.</b><br>
      Zhou Yang, Bowen Xu, Jie M. Zhang, Hong Jin Kang, Jieke Shi, Junda He, David Lo.<br>
      <i>IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering (TSE)</i>, 2023.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Data Augmentation Approaches for Source Code Models: A Survey.</b><br>
      Terry Yue Zhuo, Zhou Yang, Zhensu Sun, Yufei Wang, Li Li, Xiaoning Du, Zhenchang Xing, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ICSE 2024</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>CCBERT: Self-Supervised Code Change Representation Learning.</b><br>
      Xin Zhou, Bowen Xu, DongGyun Han, Zhou Yang, Junda He, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ICSME 2023</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>ASDF: A Differential Testing Framework for Automatic Speech Recognition Systems.</b><br>
      Daniel Hao Xian Yuen, Andrew Yong Chen Pang, Zhou Yang, Chun Yong Chong, Mei Kuan Lim, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ICST 2023</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Synthesizing Speech Test Cases with Text-to-Speech? An Empirical Study on the False Alarms in Automated Speech Recognition Testing.</b><br>
      Julia Kaiwen Lau, Kelvin Kai Wen Kong, Julian Hao Yong, Per Hoong Tan, Zhou Yang, Zi Qian Yong, Joshua Chern Wey Low, Chun Yong Chong, Mei Kuan Lim, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ISSTA 2023</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>NICHE: A Curated Dataset of Engineered Machine Learning Projects in Python.</b><br>
      Ratnadira Widyasari, Zhou Yang, Ferdian Thung, Sheng Qin Sim, Fiona Wee, Camellia Lok, Jack Phan, Haodi Qi, Constance Tan, Qijin Tay, David Lo.<br>
      <i>MSR 2023</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>What Do Users Ask in Open-Source AI Repositories? An Empirical Study of GitHub Issues.</b><br>
      Zhou Yang, Chenyu Wang, Jieke Shi, Thong Hoang, Pavneet Singh Kochhar, Qinghua Lu, Zhenchang Xing, David Lo.<br>
      <i>MSR 2023</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Towards Fair Machine Learning Software: Understanding and Addressing Model Bias Through Counterfactual Thinking.</b><br>
      Ratnadira Widyasari, Zhou Yang, Ferdian Thung, Sheng Qin Sim, Fiona Wee, Camellia Lok, Jack Phan, Haodi Qi, Constance Tan, Qijin Tay, David Lo.<br>
      <i>MSR 2023</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Exploring and Repairing Gender Fairness Violations in Word Embedding-based Sentiment Analysis Model through Adversarial Patches.</b><br>
      Lin Sze Khoo, Jia Qi Bay, Ming Lee Kimberly Yap, Mei Kuan Lim, Chun Yong Chong, Zhou Yang, David Lo.<br>
      <i>SANER 2023</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Stealthy Backdoor Attack for Code Models.</b><br>
      Zhaoyang Wang, Zhou Yang, Mingqiu Qiu, Imam Haque, Lorne Brown, Yuheng He, Jiajun Wang, David Lo, Weiyi Zhang.<br>
      <i>SANER 2023</i>.
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-year-group">
  <div class="pub-year">2022</div>
  <div class="pub-entries">
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>BiasFinder: Metamorphic Test Generation to Uncover Bias for Sentiment Analysis Systems.</b><br>
      Muhammad Hilmi Asyrofi, Zhou Yang, Imam Nur Bani Yusuf, Hong Jin Kang, Ferdian Thung, David Lo.<br>
      <i>IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering (TSE)</i>, 2022.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Natural Attack for Pre-trained Models of Code.</b><br>
      Zhou Yang, Jieke Shi, Junda He, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ICSE 2022</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>PTM4Tag: Sharpening Tag Recommendation of Stack Overflow Posts with Pre-trained Models.</b><br>
      Junda He, Bowen Xu, Zhou Yang, DongGyun Han, Chengran Yang, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ICPC 2022</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Answer Summarization for Technical Queries: Benchmark and New Approach.</b><br>
      Chengran Yang, Bowen Xu, Ferdian Thung, Yucen Shi, Ting Zhang, Zhou Yang, Xin Zhou, Jieke Shi, Junda He, DongGyun Han, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ASE 2022</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Compressing Pre-trained Models of Code into 3 MB.</b><br>
      Jieke Shi, Zhou Yang, Bowen Xu, Hong Jin Kang, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ASE 2022</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Curiosity-Driven and Victim-Aware Adversarial Policies.</b><br>
      Chen Gong, Zhou Yang, Yunpeng Bai, Jieke Shi, Arunesh Sinha, Bowen Xu, David Lo, Xinwen Hou, Guoliang Fan.<br>
      <i>ACSAC 2022</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Aspect-Based API Review Classification: How Far Can Pre-Trained Transformer Model Go?</b><br>
      Chengran Yang, Bowen Xu, Junaed Younus Khan, Gias Uddin, DongGyun Han, Zhou Yang, David Lo.<br>
      <i>SANER 2022</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Revisiting Neuron Coverage Metrics and Quality of Deep Neural Networks.</b><br>
      Zhou Yang, Jieke Shi, Muhammad Hilmi Asyrofi, David Lo.<br>
      <i>SANER 2022</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Can Identifier Splitting Improve Open-Vocabulary Language Model of Code?</b><br>
      Jieke Shi, Zhou Yang, Junda He, Bowen Xu, David Lo.<br>
      <i>SANER 2022</i>.
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-year-group">
  <div class="pub-year">2021</div>
  <div class="pub-entries">
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>Can Differential Testing Improve Automatic Speech Recognition Systems?</b><br>
      Zhou Yang, Jieke Shi, Shaowei Wang, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ASE 2021</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>BiasHeal: On-the-Fly Black-Box Healing of Bias in Sentiment Analysis Systems.</b><br>
      Muhammad Hilmi Asyrofi, Zhou Yang, Jieke Shi, Chu Wei Quan, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ICSME 2021</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>CrossASR++: A Modular Differential Testing Framework for Automatic Speech Recognition.</b><br>
      Zhou Yang, Harshit Jain, Jieke Shi, Muhammad Hilmi Asyrofi, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ICSME 2021</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>BiasRV: Uncovering Biased Sentiment Predictions at Runtime.</b><br>
      Zhou Yang, Muhammad Hilmi Asyrofi, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ESEC/FSE 2021</i>.
    </div>
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>IncBL: Incremental Bug Localization.</b><br>
      Muhammad Hilmi Asyrofi, Zhou Yang, David Lo.<br>
      <i>ESEC/FSE 2021</i>.
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pub-year-group">
  <div class="pub-year">2020</div>
  <div class="pub-entries">
    <div class="pub-entry">
      <b>An Auction-based Rescue Task Allocation Approach for Heterogeneous Multi-robot System.</b><br>
      Jieke Shi, Zhou Yang, Junwu Zhu.<br>
      <i>Multimedia Tools and Applications</i>, 2020.
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
